# Import peptide-spectrum matches

Reads as set of `mzId` files containing PSMs an generates a
`data.frame`.

## Usage

``` r
readMzIdData(files)
```

## Arguments

- files:

  A `character` of `mzid` files.

## Value

A `data.frame` containing the PSMs stored in the `mzId` files.

## Details

This function uses the functionality provided by the `mzR` package to
access data in the `mzId` files. An object of class `mzRident` can also
be coerced to a `data.frame` using `as(, "data.frame")`.

## See also

[`filterIdentificationDataFrame()`](https://lgatto.github.io/MSnbase/reference/filterIdentificationDataFrame.md)
to filter out unreliable PSMs.

## Author

Laurent Gatto

## Examples

``` r
f <- MsDataHub::TMT_Erwinia_1uLSike_Top10HCD_isol2_45stepped_60min_01.20141210.mzid()
#> see ?MsDataHub and browseVignettes('MsDataHub') for documentation
#> loading from cache
readMzIdData(f)
```
